src/pages/ProfilePage.jsx: <button onClick={onLogout} className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white text-sm transition" >
<h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
<div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 p-8 mb-8">

<button onClick={handleChangePassword} disabled={newPassword.length < 8} className="flex-1 py-3 px-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 hover:from-purple-700 hover:to-pink-700 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg transition disabled:opacity-50" >

<input type="email" name="email" value={formData.email} onChange={handleEditChange} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition" />
<span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-500/20 text-green-300 text-xs font-semibold">
<div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 p-8">
<span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-500/20 border border-green-500/50 text-green-300 text-sm">
<div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10">

<input type="text" name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleEditChange} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition" />
<div key={notification.key} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition">

<input type="password" placeholder="Enter current password" className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition" />

<button onClick={handleSave} className="w-full py-3 px-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 hover:from-purple-700 hover:to-pink-700 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2" >
<div className={`absolute top-1 left-1 w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full transition transform ${ notificationSettings[notification.key] ? 'translate-x-5' : '' }`} >
<div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-purple-900 to-slate-900 p-4 md:p-8">
<div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start md:items-center gap-6 mb-8">
<span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-500/20 border border-blue-500/50 text-blue-300 text-sm">
